setupTasks.name: Install system deps (Xvfb, Chromium, FFmpeg)
setupTasks.command: apt-get install -y xvfb ffmpeg x11-utils xdotool fonts-liberation fonts-dejavu-core libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libnspr4 libdbus-1-3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libcairo2 wget && wget -q https://dl.google.com/linux/direct/google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb -O /tmp/chrome.deb && apt-get install -y /tmp/chrome.deb || apt-get install -yf && rm /tmp/chrome.deb
